Add to Team

Update Roster / Items

Pokémon Champions' roster and item pool change with each Regulation update, and there's no live feed this app can pull automatically.

Manual Pokémon List

Checked = currently in Champions. Tap any entry to toggle it. Sorted: selected Pokémon, then selected Megas, then unselected Pokémon, then unselected Megas (alphabetical within each group).

Update Champions Roster

Pokémon Champions' roster changes with every Regulation update, and there's no live feed this app can pull automatically. To refresh it: check a roster source (Bulbapedia's "List of Pokémon in Pokémon Champions", PokéBase, or Serebii) for the current list, then paste Pokémon names below — one per line, lowercase with hyphens for spaces (e.g. raichu-alola). This replaces the "Champions only" list used for greying out cards.
